schema_doc: queries.json — 50 research questions spanning econ, ML/AI, biomedical, social, cross-disciplinary. Mix: 15 public + 10 v3.8.3-variant + 25 user-provided. | n=50 (q001-q050, 25 user + 25 user)

queries.query: AI tutoring systems and their effect on K-12 student learning outcomes
queries.notes: RealScholarQuery-style: educational technology + LLM/AI tutoring

queries.query: automation impact on labor market gender wage gap
queries.notes: Labor econ + automation; cross-domain

queries.query: vector quantized representations for document retrieval
queries.notes: ML retrieval; technical jargon expected

queries.query: Bayesian structural time series for causal inference
queries.notes: Methodology-focused query

queries.query: effects of universal basic income on labor supply
queries.notes: Public policy econ

queries.query: long-context transformer attention degradation on long documents
queries.notes: NLP / long context

queries.query: climate change adaptation in agricultural production
queries.notes: Climate econ / ag econ

queries.query: drug repurposing using graph neural networks
queries.notes: Biomed ML

queries.query: randomized controlled trial designs for digital health interventions
queries.notes: Clinical methodology

queries.query: institutional trust and policy compliance in pandemic responses
queries.notes: Poli sci / sociology

queries.query: federated learning privacy guarantees in healthcare
queries.notes: Privacy + ML + health

queries.query: carbon pricing effectiveness in OECD countries
queries.notes: Environmental econ

queries.query: transformer-based protein structure prediction methods
queries.notes: Bio + ML

queries.query: inequality and intergenerational mobility in education
queries.notes: Education econ

queries.query: few-shot prompting strategies for domain-specific question answering
queries.notes: NLP prompting

queries.query: labor economics gender wage gap empirical evidence
queries.notes: Topic 1 variant — direct from v3.8.3 real-corpus test

queries.query: industrial economics AI productivity gains in manufacturing
queries.notes: Topic 2 variant

queries.query: AI education impact on student learning outcomes
queries.notes: Topic 3 variant — known precision weakness (deep-learning review pollution)

queries.query: intelligent tutoring systems adaptive learning algorithms
queries.notes: More specific than q018 — should narrow results

queries.query: ChatGPT in higher education student performance study
queries.notes: Recent (2023-2024) framing

queries.query: automation displacement manufacturing workers empirical
queries.notes: Topic 2 narrower variant

queries.query: machine learning labor market polarization
queries.notes: Cross-domain econ + ML

queries.query: personalized learning adaptive educational technology RCT
queries.notes: Methodology + edu_ai

queries.query: Acemoglu Restrepo automation tasks model
queries.notes: Specific author + model name — should find 2-3 canonical papers

queries.query: AI bias in education gender race
queries.notes: AI fairness + education
